mapper.insert: insert into t_transaction_history( product_id , amount_of_change, supplier_id, customer_id, user_id, remarks ) value ( #{productId}, #{amountOfChange}, #{supplierId}, #{customerId}, #{userId}, #{remarks} )
mapper.select: select history.id as historyId, history.product_id as productId, history.amount_of_change as amountOfChange, history.supplier_id as supplierId, history.customer_id as customerId, history.user_id as userId, history.remarks, history.register_date_time as historyRegisterDateTime, customer.name as customerName, concat(user.family_name,user.first_name) as fullName from t_transaction_history as history left join m_customer as customer on history.customer_id = customer.id left join m_user as user on history.user_id = user.id where history.product_id = #{productId} order by history.register_date_time desc
